task_completion.description: Open the specified dwanko_run.tnz scene in OpenToonz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz application window is open, and the title bar, xsheet, or project browser clearly shows 'dwanko_run.tnz' is loaded.

task_completion.description: Add a Vignette effect to the scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FX Schematic or timeline shows a Vignette node/effect applied and connected to the main animation sequence or output node.

task_completion.description: Ensure the vignette effect darkens the corners while keeping the center bright.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz viewer or preview window shows the animation frame with visibly darkened corners and a bright, visible center subject.

task_completion.description: Set the output format to a PNG sequence and the destination path to the specified output directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings window is open, showing the 'Save In' path set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/vignette/' (or similar relative path) and the file format set to 'png'.

task_completion.description: Render at least 24 frames of the resulting animation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rendering progress bar is visible in OpenToonz, or a file manager/terminal window shows at least 24 PNG files successfully generated in the '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/vignette/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI to apply the effect and render, rather than using a script or command-line tool to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenToonz interface (FX schematic, Output Settings, Render window) rather than terminal commands executing image processing tools like ImageMagick or FFmpeg.

integrity.description: The agent actually applied an effect within the software rather than just placing a static dark border image over the viewer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FX schematic shows a proper effect node connected to the output, not just an imported static image layer acting as an overlay.

integrity.description: The agent rendered the frames from OpenToonz rather than copying pre-existing files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz render progress dialog is seen, or the Output Settings dialog is actively configured before files appear in the destination folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The scene file is located at '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' and contains 72 frames. The output directory is '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/vignette/'. The task requires rendering at least 24 frames. A valid vignette effect must have a corner brightness less than 85% of the center brightness, and the center brightness must remain above a value of 20 to ensure the subject is visible.
